description: Example quiz data format for Qwen-0.5B to follow
instructions: AI should generate JSON in this exact format, filling in questions about the requested topic

questions.question: What is the closest planet to the Sun?
questions.correctFeedback: ✅ Correct! Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun at about 36 million miles away.
questions.incorrectFeedback: ❌ Not quite. Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun.

questions.question: Which planet is known as the 'Red Planet'?
questions.correctFeedback: ✅ Correct! Mars is called the Red Planet due to iron oxide (rust) on its surface.
questions.incorrectFeedback: ❌ Not quite. Mars is known as the Red Planet.

questions.question: What year did humans first land on the Moon?
questions.correctFeedback: ✅ Correct! Apollo 11 landed on the Moon on July 20, 1969.
questions.incorrectFeedback: ❌ Not quite. The first Moon landing was in 1969 with Apollo 11.

questions.question: Which planet has the most moons?
questions.correctFeedback: ✅ Correct! Saturn has 146 confirmed moons as of 2024.
questions.incorrectFeedback: ❌ Not quite. Saturn has the most moons with 146 confirmed.

questions.question: What is the name of the galaxy that contains our Solar System?
questions.correctFeedback: ✅ Correct! Our Solar System is located in the Milky Way galaxy.
questions.incorrectFeedback: ❌ Not quite. We live in the Milky Way galaxy.
